meta.title: Puristine Impex LLP | Premium Global Import Export
meta.description: Puristine Impex LLP — trusted international supplier of premium food products, spices, pulses, and innovative home-care solutions for global B2B partners.

hero.title: Global Trade. Premium Quality. Trusted Partnerships.
hero.subtitle: Puristine Impex LLP specializes in sourcing and supplying premium food products, spices, pulses, and innovative home-care solutions worldwide.

aboutPreview.label: Who We Are
aboutPreview.title: From Heritage Roots to Global Excellence
aboutPreview.p1: Established from the legacy of Puristine Foods, we expanded into Puristine Impex LLP to serve international markets with the same uncompromising quality our name represents.
aboutPreview.p2: Our import-export expertise spans premium spices, pulses, flours, sauces, and an expanding portfolio of home-care innovations — all delivered through customer-centric sourcing and ethical partnerships.

categoriesSection.label: Our Portfolio
categoriesSection.title: Premium Product Categories
categoriesSection.subtitle: Curated selections for discerning international buyers — export-ready quality, flexible packaging, and reliable supply.

featured.label: Featured Selection
featured.title: Export-Ready Products
featured.subtitle: A glimpse into our international catalog — premium grades, consistent specifications, and B2B-ready packaging.

expertise.title: Strong Product Expertise
expertise.desc: Deep category knowledge across spices, pulses, and FMCG — ensuring the right grades for every market.

flexible.title: Flexible Supply & Packaging
flexible.desc: Custom MOQs, private labeling, and packaging formats tailored to your distribution channels.

logistics.title: Reliable Logistics
logistics.desc: End-to-end export coordination with trusted freight partners and documentation support.

portfolio.title: Diverse Product Portfolio
portfolio.desc: One trusted partner for multiple categories — simplifying procurement and supply chain management.

customer.title: Customer-Centric Focus
customer.desc: Dedicated account support, transparent communication, and long-term partnership mindset.

fairewash.label: Expanding Categories
fairewash.title: Fairewash Home-Care Solutions
fairewash.subtitle: Sustainable, innovative cleaning products designed for modern households and international retail.

product1.name: Laundry Detergent Sheets
product1.desc: Eco-friendly, space-saving laundry sheets with powerful cleaning performance.

product2.name: Floor Cleaner Sheets
product2.desc: Convenient dissolvable sheets for sparkling floors — less plastic, more impact.

export.title: Export Operations
export.desc: Streamlined export processes compliant with international trade standards.

ethical.title: Ethical Sourcing
ethical.desc: Responsible supply chains with verified growers and manufacturers.

quality.title: Quality Assurance
quality.desc: Rigorous quality checks at every stage — from sourcing to shipment.

sustainable.title: Sustainable Products
sustainable.desc: Growing portfolio of eco-conscious home-care and packaging solutions.

partnerships.title: Long-Term Partnerships
partnerships.desc: We invest in relationships that grow with your business across markets.

cta.title: Let's Build Global Partnerships
cta.subtitle: Ready to source premium products for your market? Our export team is here to help.

footer.tagline: Premium global trade in food products and home-care solutions. Trusted by international buyers worldwide.

spices.title: Spices
spices.desc: Premium whole and ground spices for global cuisines.
spices.longDesc: Export-grade spices sourced from trusted growing regions — turmeric, cumin, coriander, chilli, and specialty blends with consistent color, aroma, and mesh specifications.

pulses.title: Pulses
pulses.desc: High-quality dals and legumes for international markets.
pulses.longDesc: Toor, moong, chana, and urad dals — cleaned, sorted, and packed to meet export standards with customizable bag sizes and branding.

flours.title: Flours
flours.desc: Fine-grade wheat, besan, and specialty flours.
flours.longDesc: Premium atta, besan, and rice flour for retail and food-service — consistent grind, freshness, and food-safety compliance.

sauces.title: Sauces
sauces.desc: Authentic chutneys and condiments for global palates.
sauces.longDesc: Traditional and contemporary sauces — green chutney, tamarind, and specialty condiments in export-ready packaging.

pickles.title: Pickles
pickles.desc: Traditional Indian pickles with export-grade quality.
pickles.longDesc: Mango, lime, mixed vegetable pickles — crafted with authentic recipes and shelf-stable formulations for international distribution.

syrups.title: Syrups
syrups.desc: Rose, khus, and fruit syrups for beverages and desserts.
syrups.longDesc: Concentrated syrups for beverages, desserts, and food service — vibrant flavors with consistent viscosity and shelf life.

namkeens-sweets.title: Namkeens & Sweets
namkeens-sweets.desc: Snacks and confectionery for retail export.
namkeens-sweets.longDesc: Curated namkeens and mithai selections — hygienically packed for retail shelves and food-service channels worldwide.

instant-mixes.title: Instant Mixes
instant-mixes.longDesc: Idli, dosa, gulab jamun, and specialty instant mixes — consistent taste profiles for global Indian diaspora and mainstream markets.

mouth-fresheners.title: Mouth Fresheners
mouth-fresheners.desc: Paan masala and mukhwas for specialty retail.
mouth-fresheners.longDesc: Premium mouth fresheners and mukhwas — export-compliant formulations with attractive retail packaging.

disposable-products.title: Disposable Products
disposable-products.longDesc: Plates, cups, and food-service disposables — quality materials suitable for events, catering, and retail.

patanjali-products.title: Patanjali Products
patanjali-products.desc: Authorized distribution of Patanjali FMCG range.
patanjali-products.longDesc: Complete Patanjali product lines for international distributors — personal care, food, and wellness categories.

home-care.title: Home Care Products
home-care.longDesc: Fairewash detergent sheets, floor cleaners, and expanding home-care innovations — sustainable formats for modern households.

turmeric-powder.name: Premium Turmeric Powder
turmeric-powder.desc: High-curcumin turmeric with vibrant color — export grade.

toor-dal.name: Toor Dal
toor-dal.desc: Sorted, polished pigeon peas for consistent cooking quality.

wheat-flour.name: Premium Wheat Flour
wheat-flour.desc: Fine-ground atta for rotis, breads, and bakery applications.

green-chutney.name: Green Chutney
green-chutney.desc: Authentic coriander-mint chutney — ready for retail.

mango-pickle.name: Mango Pickle
mango-pickle.desc: Traditional aam ka achar with balanced spice profile.

rose-syrup.name: Rose Syrup
rose-syrup.desc: Fragrant rose concentrate for beverages and desserts.

turmeric.name: Turmeric Powder
turmeric.desc: Export-grade haldi with consistent curcumin levels.

cumin.name: Cumin Seeds
cumin.desc: Premium jeera — bold aroma, uniform size.

coriander.name: Coriander Powder
coriander.desc: Fresh-ground dhania for curries and blends.

red-chilli.name: Red Chilli Powder
red-chilli.desc: Vibrant colour and controlled heat levels.

garam-masala.name: Garam Masala
garam-masala.desc: Signature blend for authentic Indian cuisine.

cardamom.name: Green Cardamom
cardamom.desc: Bold, aromatic elaichi — whole and ground.

moong-dal.name: Moong Dal
moong-dal.desc: Split green gram — quick-cooking, export quality.

chana-dal.name: Chana Dal
chana-dal.desc: Split Bengal gram with uniform polish.

urad-dal.name: Urad Dal
urad-dal.desc: Black gram splits for idli, dosa, and curries.

besan.name: Besan (Gram Flour)
besan.desc: Fine chickpea flour for snacks and sweets.

rice-flour.name: Rice Flour
rice-flour.desc: Gluten-free flour for South Indian specialties.

categories.title: Product Categories
categories.subtitle: Explore our complete export portfolio — premium food products and home-care solutions for global markets.

about.title: About Puristine Impex
about.subtitle: Heritage, expertise, and a vision for global trade excellence.

story.label: Our Story
story.title: From Puristine Foods to Global Impex
story.p1: Puristine Impex LLP was born from the trusted foundation of Puristine Foods — a name synonymous with quality in Indian food products.
story.p2: Recognizing growing international demand, we expanded our operations to serve exporters, distributors, and retailers across continents with the same integrity that built our domestic reputation.

mission.label: Mission
mission.title: Delivering Excellence Across Borders
mission.text: To connect global markets with premium Indian food products and innovative home-care solutions through ethical sourcing, reliable logistics, and customer-first partnerships.

vision.label: Vision
vision.title: A Trusted Global Trade Partner
vision.text: To be the preferred B2B export partner for discerning buyers worldwide — known for quality, transparency, and sustainable growth.

expertise.label: Expertise
expertise.title: Global Trade Excellence
expertise.text: Our team brings decades of combined experience in FMCG export, quality assurance, and international compliance — ensuring smooth transactions from inquiry to delivery.

commitment.label: Commitment
commitment.title: Quality Without Compromise
commitment.text: Every product we export reflects our commitment to food safety, consistent specifications, and packaging that meets international retail standards.

growth.label: Future Growth
growth.title: Expanding Horizons
growth.text: With Fairewash home-care innovations and an ever-growing product catalog, we continue investing in categories that meet evolving global consumer trends.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Start your export inquiry — our team responds within one business day.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.exportText: Looking to source products for your market? Tell us your requirements — MOQ, packaging, and destination — and we'll prepare a tailored proposal.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Puristine Impex LLP respects your privacy. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect information when you visit our website or contact us for business inquiries.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: These terms govern your use of the Puristine Impex LLP website. By accessing this site, you agree to these terms in full.
